title: RPG Abilities
description: Adds four classes, each with their own unique ability.
body:
# **Rpg Abilities**
## Description
When the game begins choose a class and get a special ability, each class has their own unique ability which you can activate on the press of a key.
## 4 Classes
The mod currently has **4** classes. Each with their own ability.
- **Warrior:** Charge
- **Rogue:** Dash
- **Cleric:** Bind
- **Wizard:** Transmute

More in depth descriptions of each ability can be found by going in game and opening the class menu.  
(Default hotkey = V)
## Use:
THIS MOD NEEDS TO BE INSTALLED ON BOTH CLIENT AND SERVER IN ORDER TO FUNCTION
